name: researchflow
description: Codex-native research experiment management for lineage, evidence, and session state.

interface.shortDescription: Manage research experiments, lineage, prompts, states, and artifacts.
interface.longDescription: ResearchFlow gives Codex a local-first experiment memory: scan runs, search prior work, trace experiment lineage, compare metrics/configs, and close research sessions into Git-friendly records.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use ResearchFlow to inspect prior experiments before planning new research work, then close the session when done.
